---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for pinqops
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What problem are you trying to solve? What's the use case?

## Proposed solution

Describe what you'd like to happen (e.g. a new `pinqops` command or option).

## Scope check

pinqops is intentionally minimal at its core. Please confirm your request is not
on the [non-goals list](../../README.md#non-goals-out-of-scope)
(Kubernetes/Swarm, web UI, multi-server/environment, rollbacks, advanced
monitoring). If it is, explain why it still belongs here.

## Alternatives considered

Any alternative solutions or workarounds you've considered.

## Additional context

Anything else relevant.
